name: ai-transmute
description: Convert AI skills, plugins, hooks, agents, and notebooks through auditable OKF intermediates.

interface.shortDescription: Port AI artifacts through auditable OKF jobs.
interface.longDescription: Inspect, plan, convert, extract, transform, validate, and compare AI extension artifacts across Codex, Claude, Copilot, Grok, and Gemini.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect this AI artifact, plan a loss-aware conversion, and render an audited target package.
